description: Designed for elegance and comfort, rockport shoes are engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet. This makes rockport shoes an absolute favourite for everyday wear, as it makes for a great set of casual formals with a solid blend of form and function. UpperFull-grain leather upper for added strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the hide This leather upper also makes it easy to clean and enhances shoe life Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistersMidsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and enhances support and flexibility to aid walkingOutsole Flex grooves provide durable grip on various surfaces Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impact
